summary: Phase 4: Institutional Hardening testing complete. All backend APIs (Audit Logging, Backup/Recovery, Prometheus Metrics) working correctly. Frontend System Admin page with Audit Logs and Backup & Recovery tabs fully functional. 16/16 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: Prometheus metrics endpoint is at /metrics (internal port 8001) not /api/metrics - this is intentional for Prometheus scraping but may need documentation

critical_code_review_comments: Audit logging service has tamper-evident logging with SHA-256 checksums - working correctly
Backup service supports full and critical backups with compression - working correctly
System Admin page has proper data-testid attributes: tab-audit, tab-backup, system-admin-page
Role-based visibility for System Admin link is correctly implemented (user?.role === 'admin')
Note: Demo user currently has admin role in database - this is a data issue, not code issue

demo_user.note: Currently has admin role in DB

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Institutional Hardening verified. All features working: Audit Logs API (GET /api/audit/logs, /api/audit/statistics, /api/audit/my-activity, /api/audit/security-events), Backup API (GET /api/admin/backup/list, POST /api/admin/backup/create, GET /api/admin/backup/stats, DELETE /api/admin/backup/{name}), Prometheus metrics at /metrics (internal port). Frontend System Admin page has two tabs: Audit Logs (shows stats, log entries with expandable details) and Backup & Recovery (shows DB stats, backup list, create/delete buttons).

features_tested.Audit Logs API - GET /api/audit/logs: PASS - Returns audit log entries with pagination
features_tested.Audit Logs API - GET /api/audit/statisti: PASS - Returns total_events, failed_events, unique_users, by_severity, by_category
features_tested.Audit Logs API - Login attempts logged: PASS - auth.login events created with checksums
features_tested.Backup API - POST /api/admin/backup/crea: PASS - Creates new backup with statistics
features_tested.Backup API - GET /api/admin/backup/stats: PASS - Returns database statistics per collection
features_tested.Prometheus metrics - GET /metrics: PASS - Returns Prometheus format metrics on internal port
features_tested.Frontend System Admin - Audit Logs tab: PASS - Shows stats (Total Events, Failed Events, Unique Users, Security Events) and log entries
features_tested.Frontend System Admin - Backup & Recover: PASS - Shows DB stats, backup list, create/delete buttons, collections breakdown
features_tested.Frontend sidebar - System Admin link: PASS - Visible for admin users (role-based check working)
